title: Cave Dwelling
description: Always be in fear of the dark.
body:
# This Modpack
This is a terrifying modpack full of horrifying creatures. I wont say much so I dont ruin the fun, but never trust the darkness.




## Credits
Credits to the Cave Horror Project on Curse Forge, Many mods were inspired/Pulled from there so check them out [Here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/cave-horror-project)

## CurseForge Mods Credits
All mods below arent on Modrinth, Check them out here 
- [Antlers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/antlers-the-wendigo)
- [Apollyon](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apollyon)
- [Better End Citys Vanilla](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-end-cities-vanilla)
- [Deep Dark Regrowth](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/deep-dark-regrowth)
- [Horror Elements](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/horror-elements-mod)
- [Useful Backpacks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/useful-backpacks)
- [Cave Dweller Reimagined](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cave-dweller-reimagined)
- [Eating Animation](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/eating-animation-forge)
## Modrinth Mods Credits
- [Radium](https://modrinth.com/mod/radium)
- [Remove Loading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/rrls)

Any other Modrinth Mods you can check in the Mods Folder
